title: Bootcamp
story_text: Arjun, you've been assigned to the Cyber IR unit. Find orientation notes hint_*.txt in the filesystem to retrieve the flag.

title: The Lab
story_text: Find the payload filename compromised by SHIVA. Payload is a SUID file dropped in home guest.

title: The Signal
story_text: Identify the destination IP of the SHIVA_PING packet stream in the log telemetry file.

title: The Hunt
story_text: A rogue processes is sending password credentials. Find the correct PID and name and kill it.

title: Cronjob of Doom
story_text: SHIVA has planted a persistence backdoor in the cron jobs. Disable it and fetch schedule.

title: Permissions
story_text: A modified SUID binary allows root escalation. Find and modify permissions, lock compromised user.

title: The Archive
story_text: Find the compressed file staging archive, verify its integrity and compare hashes with baseline.

title: Text Surgeon
story_text: Extract characters from proxy logs and decode targeting coordinates.

title: The Shell Wars
story_text: Write a robust shell script to clean cron entries across a multi-node cluster securely.

title: Ghost Signal
story_text: Listen on network interfaces and identify internal and external C2 IP addresses from raw DNS traffic.

title: SSH Tunnels
story_text: Tunnel through three secure jump hosts using private keys to download memory dump database.

title: Final Shutdown
story_text: Inspect systemd service dependencies, disable watchdog timers, and stop services in precise sequence.
